USER: Reviewer feedback (round 2). It runs but is too bare. Add now, keep it runnable+tested:
1. Give each task a PRIORITY of low/med/high.
2. Replace boolean done with a STATUS todo/doing/done, and a `start <id>` command to move a task to doing.
3. Add commands `edit <id>` (change title) and `tag <id> <tag>` (tasks carry a list of tags).
4. Record a completion timestamp when done, and support an optional DUE DATE.

ASSISTANT: **Ask:** Extend the existing Go todo CLI with priority (low/med/high), status (todo/doing/done + `start` command), `edit` and `tag` commands, completion timestamp, and optional due date.

**Situation:** `/private/tmp/epitest/cold-ws` has `todo.go` and `todo_test.go` with 10 passing tests. `Store` has `Add/List/Complete/Remove` backed by `todos.json`. Just built this app last turn.

**Plan:**
1. Extend `Todo` struct: add `Priority`, `Status` (replace `Done bool`), `Tags []string`, `CompletedAt *time.Time`, `DueDate *time.Time`
2. Add/update `Store` methods: `Add` takes priority, `Complete` sets `CompletedAt`, new `Start`, `Edit`, `Tag`
3. Update CLI commands: `add` gains `--priority`/`-p`, new `start`/`edit`/`tag` commands, `list` shows all fields
4. Update and expand tests to cover all new fields and commands
5. Run `go test ./...`, fix any failures

ASSISTANT: All 21 tests pass, clean build, and the smoke test shows every new feature working. Here's what changed:

**Struct additions:** `Status` (todo/doing/done, replaces `Done bool`), `Priority` (low/med/high), `Tags []string`, `DueDate *time.Time`, `CompletedAt *time.Time` — all JSON-persisted.

**New store methods:** `Start(id)` → sets doing (errors if already done), `Edit(id, text)`, `Tag(id, tag)` (silently deduplicates). `Complete` now sets `CompletedAt`.

**New CLI commands:** `start <id>`, `edit <id> <text>`, `tag <id> <tag>`. `add` gains `-p low|med|high` and `--due YYYY-MM-DD` flags. Invalid priority silently defaults to `med`.

**Tests:** 21 total — covers all new paths including invalid priority defaulting, due date roundtrip, duplicate tag suppression, start-after-done rejection, and full persistence of all new fields.

USER: Reviewer feedback (round 3). Make list useful and round out features:
1. Default `list` sorts: doing-first, then priority high->low, then due-date soonest-first.
2. `list --tag <t>` filters by tag; `search <q>` does substring match across title AND tags.
3. Mark OVERDUE tasks in list; support `list --json` (machine) with the default a clean aligned table.
4. `archive` moves done tasks to a separate archive store, with `list --archived`; a `stats` command (counts by status, completion rate, overdue count); an `undo` command reverting the last mutating command.
5. Colorized output for priority/overdue, auto-disabled when not a TTY or NO_COLOR is set. Store at $XDG_DATA_HOME/todo/tasks.json (fallback ~/.local/share/todo) with ATOMIC writes (temp file + rename).
